<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/146.0.0.0" version="29.6.6" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="sw_arch_clean" name="Lower Computer Software Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="957" dy="838" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="bg_isr" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#CCCCCC;dashed=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#666666;" value="后台中断服务 (ISR)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="220" x="125" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg_main" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#CCCCCC;dashed=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#666666;" value="前台主循环 (Main Loop)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="360" x="400" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sys_start" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;fontStyle=1;" value="系统启动与 HAL 库初始化" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="310" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BUfAkhcM0DuJmwcfSjuk-8" edge="1" parent="1" source="ui_init" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;curved=0;" target="flag_check"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ui_init" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;fontStyle=1;" value="软件外设与 UI 界面初始化" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="310" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_start_init" edge="1" parent="1" source="sys_start" target="ui_init"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="isr_adc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F0F8FF;strokeColor=#A9C4EB;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;" value="ADC DMA 中断
(半传输 / 满传输)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="155" y="295" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BUfAkhcM0DuJmwcfSjuk-2" edge="1" parent="1" source="isr_tim" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;curved=0;dashed=1;" target="main_process"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="isr_tim" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F0F8FF;strokeColor=#A9C4EB;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;" value="定时器捕获中断
(上升沿频率测量)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="155" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BUfAkhcM0DuJmwcfSjuk-3" edge="1" parent="1" source="isr_exti" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;curved=0;dashed=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="flag_check"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="370" y="320" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="isr_exti" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F0F8FF;strokeColor=#A9C4EB;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;" value="外部 EXTI 中断
(按键与编码器事件)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="155" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="isr_usb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F0F8FF;strokeColor=#A9C4EB;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;" value="USB 通讯中断<br>(CDC 数据分包发送)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="155" y="535" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flag_check" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#E6D29A;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;" value="轮询检查全局标志位
(数据就绪 / 输入事件)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="500" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BUfAkhcM0DuJmwcfSjuk-4" edge="1" parent="1" source="main_process" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;curved=0;" target="main_update"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="main_process" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#A5D6A7;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;" value="波形触发搜索与参数计算
(Vpp/频率平滑)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="430" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BUfAkhcM0DuJmwcfSjuk-5" edge="1" parent="1" source="main_ui" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;curved=0;" target="main_update"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="main_ui" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#A5D6A7;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;" value="UI 交互逻辑处理
(参数配置/模式切换)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="600" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="main_update" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#A5D6A7;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;" value="更新波形显存与 USB 发送<br>(坐标映射插值 / 数据透传)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="145" x="507.5" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="main_flush" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#A5D6A7;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;" value="SPI DMA 刷屏
(垂直局部刷新算法)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="145" x="507.5" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_flag_data" edge="1" parent="1" source="flag_check" target="main_process"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="500" y="370" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_flag_ui" edge="1" parent="1" source="flag_check" target="main_ui"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="670" y="370" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_upd_flush" edge="1" parent="1" source="main_update" target="main_flush"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_flush_loop" edge="1" parent="1" source="main_flush" style="exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="flag_check"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="745" y="575" /> <mxPoint x="745" y="460" /> <mxPoint x="745" y="320" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="660" y="605" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="675" y="320" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_isr_data" edge="1" parent="1" source="isr_adc" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=light-dark(#FF6666,#FFFFFF);strokeWidth=1;" target="flag_check"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="330" y="320" /> <mxPoint x="330" y="320" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label_isr_data" edge="1" parent="edge_isr_data" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=10;fontColor=#FF6666;backgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" value="标志位 = 1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
